mainEntity.name: Getting Paid While You Recover from a Factory Injury
mainEntity.text: Getting Paid While You Recover from a Factory Injury

acceptedAnswer.text: Wondering how to pay bills while recovering from a crush injury? Workers' comp should cover your medical bills and a portion of your lost wages. If they’re dragging their feet or denying your diagnosis, it's time to get a pro involved. We handle the paperwork so you can focus on physical therapy. Give us a ring at 801-746-0290 to see how we can speed up your checks.
